visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) A middle-aged man with glasses and a grey flat cap stands against a plain white wall. He is wearing a light green t-shirt and holds a vivo smartphone in his right hand. The screen shows a lock screen image of a woman. The lighting is bright and even, typical of a professional studio setup. (2) The camera switches to a screen recording of the smartphone's interface. A finger navigates through the settings menu, highlighting 'Shortcut & Accessibility' and then 'AI Subtitles'. The background is the white and grey system menu of the OriginOS. (3) The screen is now split horizontally. The top half shows a YouTube video by MKBHD, while the bottom half displays the AI Subtitles interface. Text is being generated in real-time as the background video plays. Yellow caption overlays appear at the bottom of the main frame. (4) The visual transitions to the smartphone's notes application. The user taps an 'AI Summary' button, and a structured bullet-point list appears on the screen, summarizing the previous content. The background is a clean white digital document. (5) Two smartphones are placed side-by-side on a wooden surface: an iPhone and a vivo phone. The man's hands are visible as he demonstrates a file transfer process between the two devices. Progress bars and transfer confirmation icons appear on both screens.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Logo]: 3c有意思tim哥. [Logo]: @3ctim. [Slogan]: vivo OriginOS 6. (2) [Variety]: (大聲歡呼). [Subtitle]: 終於在台灣可以使用拉. (3) [Slogan]: 快點更新. (4) [Variety]: (AI字幕辨識中). (5) [Subtitle]: 點下去之後這邊有個AI摘要. (6) [Variety]: (無痛傳送). [Slogan]: 我要傳送.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main male creator presenting the phone features.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: Middle-aged man wearing a grey flat cap, glasses, a light green t-shirt, and a wooden beaded bracelet.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A clean, minimalist indoor studio with a white wall and a wooden table surface used for product demonstrations.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) High-energy male narration starts immediately with a bright, upbeat electronic pop BGM. The voice is enthusiastic and well-articulated. (2) A synthetic 'whoosh' transition sound triggers a shift as the speaker begins detailing system settings. The BGM maintains a steady, driving rhythm. (3) A soft digital 'pop' sound occurs as the UI is interacted with. The background English speech from the YouTube clip is audible but mixed lower than the primary Chinese narration. (4) A high-pitched 'ding' SFX marks the successful activation of the AI Summary feature. The narrator's pitch rises slightly in excitement. (5) A final digital confirmation chime sounds during the file transfer demonstration. The BGM swells slightly before a clean hard cut at the end.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: Linear: Hook -> Functional Demonstrations -> Cross-Device Utility -> Conclusion
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To showcase the new features of vivo OriginOS 6, specifically focusing on AI-driven subtitles, automated meeting summaries, and seamless cross-platform file transfers to entice current vivo users to update.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Direct demonstration of brand-specific software features (OriginOS 6) and verbal calls to action for vivo users.

high_inference.freeDescribe: The video uses high-frequency technical SFX and fast-paced editing typical of social media tech influencers to maintain viewer engagement during software feature explanations.
